data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding guardian approval.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Guardian approval requirements per service', but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for guardian approval, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or confirmations regarding the approval process itself. This indicates a gap in the validation process, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of guardian approval requirements per service.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify guardian approval requirements.
